sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109059" key="u(porraxi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπορρᾰχίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n109059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hollow above the hip,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:136" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.136</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
